# This file is manually curated. Include only stable public pages.
# The site uses locale prefixes. English (/en/) is shown here; Spanish (/es/) equivalents also exist.

# Elevate Digital

> Elevate Digital is a full-service digital marketing agency that helps businesses grow through data-driven strategies, creative campaigns, and technical excellence. We specialize in SEO, PPC, content marketing, web development, and analytics for B2B and B2C clients.

Our team combines marketing expertise with technical depth to deliver measurable results. We focus on transparency, ROI-driven campaigns, and long-term client partnerships.

## Core Services

- [Services Overview](https://elevatedigital.com/en/services): Complete list of our digital marketing services including SEO, PPC, content marketing, and web development.
- [SEO Services](https://elevatedigital.com/en/services#seo): Search engine optimization services focused on technical SEO, content strategy, and link building.
- [PPC Advertising](https://elevatedigital.com/en/services#ppc): Pay-per-click campaign management across Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and LinkedIn Ads.
- [Content Marketing](https://elevatedigital.com/en/services#content): Content strategy, blog creation, and thought leadership content for B2B brands.
- [Web Development](https://elevatedigital.com/en/services#web): Custom website development with Next.js, React, and modern frameworks.

## Portfolio & Case Studies

- [Portfolio Overview](https://elevatedigital.com/en/portfolio): Our complete portfolio of client work and success stories.
- [Case Studies](https://elevatedigital.com/en/portfolio): Detailed case studies showing campaign results, ROI metrics, and strategic approaches for clients across various industries.

## About & Company

- [About Us](https://elevatedigital.com/en/about): Company history, team information, our values, and what makes Elevate Digital different.
- [Pricing](https://elevatedigital.com/en/pricing): Transparent pricing models for our services with monthly/yearly billing options.

## Resources & Blog

- [Blog](https://elevatedigital.com/en/blog): Marketing insights, industry trends, strategy guides, and tactical advice from our team.
- [FAQ](https://elevatedigital.com/en/faq): Frequently asked questions about our services, processes, and working with us.

## Legal & Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://elevatedigital.com/en/legal/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect client and visitor data.
- [Terms of Service](https://elevatedigital.com/en/legal/terms): Terms and conditions for using our website and services.

## Contact & Support

- [Contact Form](https://elevatedigital.com/en/contact): Get in touch for a consultation, project inquiry, or partnership discussion.
- [Newsletter Signup](https://elevatedigital.com/en/contact): Subscribe to our newsletter for marketing insights and company updates.

## Technical & SEO

- [Sitemap](https://elevatedigital.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of all indexable pages for search engines.
- [Robots.txt](https://elevatedigital.com/robots.txt): Crawler permissions including AI crawler access for GEO optimization.
